title: Lullaby Baby 6 Piece Baby Doll Accessories Set | Baby Doll Accessories Includes 2 Magic Milk Bottles, Feeding Bowl, Cutlery and a Dummy
features: Super Cute Baby Doll Accessories: Our Lullaby Baby adorable baby accessories set is the perfect gift to introduce young kids into the world of loving and caring and to nurture and care their new favourite doll.

Pretend Play: Our range of accessories are perfect to feed and nurture your baby doll including a dummy, feeding bowl, fork and spoon and 2 magic milk bottles as when you feed your doll the milk disappears! Perfect for imagination, creative play and for fostering creativity and developing skills.
High quality materials: Made from high quality and safe material, our accessories set will have little ones playing with them for hours on end!

Imagination stimulation: Let children use their imagination when playing with this splendid baby doll accessories set, keeping them entertained and work on hand-eye-coordination, speech and much more.
